title: Discover the Mysteries of the Universe with Ivy

after.headline: Main Event
after.note: We’ll be exploring Meow Wolf’s The Real Unreal together. Please purchase your ticket time ASAP so we can stay on the same entry window.

dress_code: Wear comfortable clothes and shoes for walking, exploring, and interactive exhibits.

schedule.title: Arrival
schedule.details: Meet near the Meow Wolf entrance and get checked in.

schedule.title: Enter The Real Unreal
schedule.details: We’ll head inside together and begin exploring the mystery.

schedule.title: Free Exploration + Photos
schedule.details: Time to roam, investigate, discover hidden details, and take birthday photos.

live_updates.intro: If anything changes during the day, I’ll update it here.

items.title: Meeting point
items.text: Meet at the Meow Wolf Grapevine entrance.

items.title: Heads up
items.text: Please buy tickets early so we can enter together.

footer_note: Questions? Reply to the RSVP email.
